title: February 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}
'''February 16''' is the 47th day of the year. There are 318 days remaining (319 in leap years).</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Jeremy Bulloch]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Doug Chiang]] is born.
*1962 – [[Dan Madsen]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] released.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 87|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 87]] published.
*[[1990]] – ''[[Entertainment Weekly Books]]'' is founded.
*[[1999]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Sergio Aragonés Stomps Star Wars]]'' published.
*2000 – [[Union 4|''Union'' 4]] published.
*2000 – [[Chewbacca (2000) 2|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 2]] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' released.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Jedi Adventures]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – [[Knight Errant 5|''Knight Errant: Aflame'' 5]] published.
*[[2013]] – "[[The Jedi Who Knew Too Much]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: A Junior Novel]]'' published in print.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 3|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 3]] published in the United States.
*[[2021]] – ''[[The Heroes of Rogue One]]'' published in Spanish.
*[[2024]] – "[[Best Friends / Happy Trails, Nubs]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2025]] – [[Julian Holloway]] dies.
